title: calyceraceae
intro: The Calyceraceae rank refers to a family of flowering plants. Calyceraceae comprises about 16 genera and around 145 species, primarily found in South America and North America. These plants are characterized by their small, five-petaled flowers and often bear distinctive seed heads or capitula. The family Calyceraceae is notable for its diversity in growth habits, ranging from shrubs to perennials, and its adaptations to various environments.
